query: 筛选规模超过100亿且本年以来收益为正的主动权益基金前20

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, wind_level1, wind_level2, wind_level3, asset_type, fund_size FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size)), latest_performance AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, period, ROUND(portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS 收益率 FROM fund_performance WHERE period = '本年以来') SELECT ls.fund_code AS 基金代码, ls.fund_name AS 基金名称, ls.fund_company AS 基金公司, ls.wind_level1 AS 一级行业, ls.wind_level2 AS 二级行业, ls.wind_level3 AS 三级行业, ls.asset_type AS 资产类型, ls.fund_size AS 规模(亿) FROM latest_size ls JOIN latest_performance lp ON ls.fund_code = lp.fund_code WHERE ls.fund_size > 100 AND lp.收益率 > 0 ORDER BY ls.fund_size DESC LIMIT 20

plan.rationale: 查询最新规模数据，筛选规模超过100亿且本年以来收益为正的基金，按规模降序排序，取前20名
